textByHashes.27593a78b36ef94046a61a5fa8acd5e5517f702f: This is Aleck's Hunter Emporium. Basically, it's just a shop with a fancy name; you can buy various weapons and traps here.
textByHashes.ac1207d376adaa8300731182e70599e5ee5c1c93: Oh, this isn't my shop; the owner is Aleck over there behind the counter.
textByHashes.324347a147a101318f9e97f6d33b6a58e1aba00a: I experiment with weapon designs. I'm here because I've been trying to convince people to back my research and maybe sell some of my products - like this one I'm holding - in their shops.
textByHashes.17a32acea3b94e91991ed043df2aea6a3dc8e25b: Aleck doesn't seem to be interested, though.
textByHashes.21ea030eee8765ad036dd8982a4c83fda1503a61: It's good, isn't it? I designed it to incorporate the bones of various animals in its construction.
textByHashes.66fd1122d76b4910f77985141aab6902f4b03bd1: It's a fair bit faster than an ordinary crossbow too; it'll take you far less time to reload between shots.
textByHashes.e94d2f873d84350375b95ac28f362c7ea2f4106d: That's what they said about my wind-powered mouse traps, too.
textByHashes.9f06c1d23aa3080dd46438bcf20f65c999043180: Well, they only ran into problems because people kept insisting on trying to use them indoors.
textByHashes.210140ba34860bfb4d5ba710bb38ce6f648fd20f: Anyway, I think my crossbow invention is showing a lot more promise.
textByHashes.e68925720ec8115c0191f550c3ea8fef7f454b56: Ah, I admit as a result of its... er... unique construction, it won't take just any old bolts.
textByHashes.5636a7478b9ab3632b5b44c703aa63afcbea1650: If you can supply the materials and a token fee, I'd be happy to make some for you.
textByHashes.d8cad4e01fd407e77e24bb31bc640b043a3cb0a2: I need kebbit spikes, lots of 'em. Not all kebbits have spikes, mind you. You'll be wanting prickly kebbits or, even better, razor-backed kebbits to get material hard enough.
textByHashes.b54d3fd0d7ce0193a609451c66bd2b452fac8fa9: Yes, I suppose you could, although you'll need a steady hand with a knife and a chisel.
textByHashes.71ccb7c062ceba8450fc990c673935fab0b9f742: The bolts have an unusual diameter, but basically you'll just need to be able to carve kebbit spikes into straight shafts.
textByHashes.d758fd4b9a45d135e2524364dfcf90f18d366755: Meanwhile, since you're here, I can make some for you if you have the materials.
textByHashes.61b35846e9255f9a1f195fd705fdcff9e1a4eaad: Well, if you ever find yourself in need of that innovative edge, you can always find me here.
textByHashes.cd7a3d3475596c9895d2ec32e836bbba99e27b2a: Oh, hey, you have one of my crossbows! How's it working for you?
